priorTitles: Evidence of pipe structural fatigue near Sector 1
Pavement settlement due to suspected main leak
Seepage identified at main arterial junction
narrative: This is a recurring pattern of infrastructure failure rather than an isolated incident. With four distinct reports submitted between February and July 2025, the progression of symptoms—ranging from localized pooling to surface settlement—indicates chronic degradation of the trunk water main. The consistency of these reports confirms that the current state is the culmination of a protracted period of structural decay, necessitating immediate intervention to prevent a catastrophic rupture.
